qualities-catalog.description: Catalog of negative metagenic qualities for SURGE changelings

rows.name: Adiposis
rows.description: Clinically obese. Walking=AGIx1, Running=AGIx2, Sprint=+0.5m/hit. -1 all physical activities. Double Fatigue DV. Halve duration between Resistance Tests.

rows.name: Astral Hazing (Non-Awakened)
rows.description: Generate Rating 3 background count extending Essence x 100m. Expands +1m per 4h if stationary (max +4).

rows.name: Astral Hazing (Awakened)
rows.description: Generate Rating 3 background count extending Essence x 100m. Also impairs own magical actions. Expands +1m per 4h if stationary (max +4).

rows.name: Berserker
rows.description: GM-triggered primal rage. Composure (3) to suppress. While enraged: +1 Physical attributes, -1 Mental attributes (min 1). Duration: 1D6 Combat Turns. Attacks anyone nearby.
rows.restrictions: Adrenaline pump always triggers during rage.

rows.name: Bioluminescence
rows.description: Green-to-blue glow from hair/skin. In partial light or darkness, reduces visibility modifiers by 1 level (makes character easier to spot).

rows.name: Cephalopod Skull
rows.description: Kraken-like head with tentacles. Soft skull/upper torso: -3 dice pool modifier when resisting damage to head/upper torso.

rows.name: Cold-Blooded
rows.description: Temperature-dependent: <30C=-1 Physical, <20C=-3 Physical, <10C=-5 Physical, 0C=comatose. -2 vs thermographic/thermal detection.

rows.name: Critter Spook
rows.description: Animals within 5m react with fear/hostility. -2 to control/soothe/pacify animals. Critters attack this character first in combat.

rows.name: Cyclopean Eye
rows.description: Single eye, no binocular vision. -1 all Combat Tests and precision-requiring technical/physical tests. Cannot compensate with cybereye.

rows.name: Deformity (Picasso)
rows.description: Severe facial deformity. -2 Perception (sensory) or -2 Physical Active Tests (motor/Quasimodo variant).

rows.name: Deformity (Quasimodo)
rows.description: Significant physical deformity. -2 Perception or -2 Physical Active Tests. Double Freaks modifiers if not hidden. Cannot be surgically corrected.

rows.name: Feathers
rows.description: Body hair replaced by feathers. +1 to Matrix Search/identify/locate tests against character. No protective value.
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with Unusual Hair and Scales. Freaks social modifiers.

rows.name: Impaired (Attribute)
rows.description: Permanently reduce one metatype attribute maximum by 2 (natural and augmented). Once per attribute. May reduce current rating if new max is lower.

rows.name: Insectoid Features
rows.description: Compound eyes, mandibles, insect wings (cosmetic). Hostile social modifier. Attacked first in combat. +1 to Matrix Search/identify/locate tests.
rows.restrictions: Freaks social modifiers (seriously affects social interactions).

rows.name: Mood Hair
rows.description: Hair changes color by emotion (visible, cannot hide). +2 to Judge Intentions Tests against character (if observer aware).
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with hair modifications, Feathers, and Scales.

rows.name: Neoteny
rows.description: Child/adolescent appearance. Physical Condition Monitor = 6 + (Body/2, round up). Custom armor/equipment +10% cost.

rows.name: Nocturnal
rows.description: Active at night, sleeps during day. All Mental attributes -1 during daylight hours.

rows.name: Progeria
rows.description: Accelerated aging. Few years to live (GM determines). Small stature, wrinkled skin. -2 all Physical Tests.
rows.restrictions: Can be halted by HMHVV infection or life-prolonging treatment.

rows.name: Scales
rows.description: Scaly skin (lizard/snake). Periodically shed. No protective value. +2 to Matrix Search/identify/locate tests.
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with bioware skin augmentations and skin-related qualities. Freaks social modifiers.

rows.name: Scent Glands
rows.description: Foul odor. +1 to locate by scent (+2 stressed). -1 all Social Tests (-2 stressed) when odor not masked.

rows.name: Slow Healer
rows.description: -2 all Healing Tests.

rows.name: Striking Skin Pigmentation
rows.description: Unusual skin color. +2 to Matrix Search/identify/locate tests.

rows.name: Stubby Arms
rows.description: -1 Reach for all Melee/Unarmed combat. -1 non-Combat Tests requiring arm/hand dexterity (GM discretion).

rows.name: Symbiosis
rows.description: Bond to location after >1 season. Body+Willpower (3) monthly to bond. Bonded: +1 Outdoor skills, +1 Social with locals, +1 Healing locally. Environmental problems cause Mild Allergy.
rows.restrictions: Bond broken by moving away 1 month + new Body+Willpower (3) Test.

rows.name: Third Eye
rows.description: Third eye on forehead. No vision modifiers. Detectable with Perception (2) even when closed.
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with Cyclopean Eye. Freaks social modifiers.

rows.name: Unusual Hair
rows.description: Unusual color/texture/pattern hair. +1 to Matrix Search/identify/locate tests.
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with other natural/artificial hair modifications.

rows.name: Vestigial Tail
rows.description: Non-functional tail. -1 all Physical Tests involving balance/movement.
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with Functional Tail, cybernetic/bioware tails. Freaks social modifiers.

negative-qualities-random-table-3-to-5-k.description: Random roll table for negative metagenic qualities costing 3 to 5 Karma bonus
